name: What's My Game?
overview: A star has arrived north of the border and she's bringing her name and her game into your home! Introducing the latest craze in the game show genre, What's My Game? featuring the winner of Canada’s Drag Race, Priyanka! Each week a drag queen and a celebrity will go head to head. Who will win? Join the fun to find out!
